mapper.insert: insert into document_upload_sessions ( upload_id, group_id, uploader_user_id, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, file_hash, chunk_size, chunk_count, status, storage_bucket, merged_object_key, expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{uploadId}, #{groupId}, #{uploaderUserId}, #{fileName}, #{fileExt}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{chunkSize}, #{chunkCount}, #{status}, #{storageBucket}, #{mergedObjectKey}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select id, upload_id, group_id, uploader_user_id, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, file_hash, chunk_size, chunk_count, status, storage_bucket, merged_object_key, expires_at, created_at, updated_at from document_upload_sessions where upload_id = #{uploadId}

select id, upload_id, group_id, uploader_user_id, file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, file_hash, chunk_size, chunk_count, status, storage_bucket, merged_object_key, expires_at, created_at, updated_at from document_upload_sessions where group_id = #{groupId} and uploader_user_id = #{uploaderUserId} and file_hash = #{fileHash} and status in ('INIT', 'UPLOADING', 'COMPLETING') and expires_at > now() order by updated_at desc, id desc limit 1
